basic_details.job_title: EPI Graduate Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Engineering Projects India Limited (EPI) has published the Graduate Apprentice Notification 2026 on 27 April 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Graduate Apprentice position. Candidates within the age range of 18 to 30 years (with relaxation of 5 years for SC/ST and 3 years for OBC) and holding BE/B.Tech in Civil/Electrical/Mechanical Engineering with minimum 55% marks are eligible to apply via email as per details on Engineering Projects India Official Website. The application process will be active up to 17 May 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and apply deta

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Min: 18 years, Max: 30 years (Relaxable by 05 years for SC/ST & 03 years for OBC)
age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 30 years Age Relaxation: 05 years for SC/ST and 03 years for OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: BE/B.Tech (Civil/Electrical/Mechanical/Engineering) with not less than 55% marks
qualification.details: Graduate Apprentice: BE/B.Tech (Civil/Electrical/Mechanical/Engineering) with not less than 55% marks from a reputed Institute/University approved by AICTE. Candidates who have undergone apprentice training in any organization are not eligible to apply.

salary_details.details: A consolidated stipend of Rs. 10,000/- (Ten Thousand only) per month will be paid during the entire training duration. Graduate Apprentices will not be paid any output bonus, other incentives, perks, or allowances.

selection_process: Shortlisting will be done on the basis of a merit list formed from the marks secured in the minimum required educational qualification. No interviews will be conducted.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for EPI Graduate Apprentice Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 17-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the EPI Graduate Apprentice recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 17th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches before the specified deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Graduate Apprentice post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a BE/B.Tech degree in Civil, Electrical, Mechanical, or Engineering disciplines with at least 55% marks from an AICTE-approved institution.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Graduate Apprentice position?
faq.answer: The minimum age is 18 years and the maximum age is 30 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST and OBC candidates.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an age relaxation of 05 years for SC/ST candidates and 03 years for OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Graduate Apprentice role?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a consolidated stipend of Rs. 10,000/- per month during the training period.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the Graduate Apprentice posts?
faq.answer: Selection will be based on a merit list prepared from the marks obtained in the minimum required educational qualification. No interviews will be conducted.

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates who have already completed apprentice training apply?
faq.answer: No, candidates who have previously undergone apprentice training in any organization are not eligible to apply for this position.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted via email to the designated email address provided in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: You need to attach self-attested copies of educational qualification certificates, proof of date of birth, and any other supporting documents as mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply?
faq.answer: The official notification and application link can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article. You can also visit the official EPI website.
